channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Understand Python’s new lock file format
item.description: Python Enhancement Proposal (PEP) 751 gives Python a new file format for specifying dependencies. This file, called a lock file, promises to allow developers to reproduce the installation of their Python projects, with the exact same sets of dependencies, from system to system.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: With a TikTok ban looming, Trump signals a deal will come before April 5 deadline
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — As the deadline to strike a deal over TikTok approaches this week, President Donald Trump has signaled that he is confident his administration can broker an agreement with ByteDance, the social media app's China-based parent company.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Annoyed by YouTube autoplaying videos on Android? Sorry, it’s not a bug, it’s another experimental feature
item.description: YouTube is yet again exploring with new features, as Android users have noticed this strange auto-play function in their mobile apps.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: BYD enjoys yet another blockbuster quarter as Tesla flounders
item.description: China's BYD Co. enjoyed a strong start to 2025, with sales up 58% in the first quarter versus the same period of last year.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: House of the Dragon showrunner hits back at George R.R. Martin criticism as filming begins on hit HBO TV show's third season
item.description: Filming is underway on House of the Dragon season 3, but it's been overshadowed by a spat between its showrunner and George R.R. Martin.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte” to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: Mike Silverman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Cisco takes inspiration from Iron Man for its AI-driven platform engineer
item.description: When it comes to developing highly intelligent AI agents, one might not think of combining open systems technology and the theoretical super-logic behind a movie character, but Cisco’s Outshift development team is doing just that.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: GameStop's Nintendo Switch 2 trade-in deals have seemingly leaked ahead of pre-orders going live, with big savings when upgrading from an original Switch
item.description: GameStop's Nintendo Switch 2 trade-in deal has seemingly leaked ahead of the Direct Showcase tomorrow.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: NASA finds generative AI can’t be trusted
item.description: Although many C-suite and line-of-business (LOB) execs are doing everything they can to focus on generative AI (genAI) efficiency and flexibility — and not about how often the technology delivers wrong answers — IT decision-makers can’t afford to do the same thing.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Spider-Man 4's official title has been revealed – and it has ties to a controversial time in the Marvel hero's 80-year-plus comic book history
item.description: Spider-Man 4 is officially named Spider-Man: Brand New Day, and it's a nod to an incredibly divisive storyline in Marvel Comics.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Parfois se apoya en la inteligencia de datos para mejorar la experiencia de cliente
item.description: Con una presencia de más de 1.000 tiendas físicas en 67 países y una plataforma de ventas en línea en constante crecimiento, Parfois se ha convertido en una de las marcas portuguesas más grandes en el exigente mercado internacional de la moda.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Volcano begins erupting in southwestern Iceland after a nearby town and spa are evacuated
item.description: Iceland’s Met Office says a volcano is erupting in the southwestern part of the country, hours after a nearby town and a geothermal spa were evacuated.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Microsoft adds data agents to Fabric to help business users with analytics
item.description: Microsoft is adding new data agents to Fabric, its cloud-based offering combining data warehousing, data science, data engineering, and data analytics services. Its goal is to help business users find insights in enterprise data without the help of a business analyst.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How IT certification can help you earn more
item.description: Your weekly round-up of the questions asked by readers of CIO, Computerworld, CSO, InfoWorld, and Network World sees Smart Answers offering advice on how IT security certifications help career advancement; how can companies overcome the complexity of S/4HANA migration projects; and why are cloud cre
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 23andMe customer DNA ‘up for grabs’ amid bankruptcy: Attorney
item.description: With a saliva sample, DNA-testing companies like 23andMe provide a profile of a person’s genetic heritage.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: How to free up space on your Mac
item.description: If you need to free up space on your Mac, consider deleting duplicate photos in your image library. Apple makes it easy to do, and the CyberGuy explains the process.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk tries to rehab DOGE after backlash, mistakes
item.description: Elon Musk is pushing to improve the image of his Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), suggesting the Tesla CEO is aware of the boogeyman persona he has created for himself and his cost-cutting push since joining President Trump’s team.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: OpenAI’s Studio Ghibli-style images renew the debate over AI and copyright
item.description: This week, the internet had a rare opportunity to transform its selfies and family photos into stunning Studio Ghibli “portraits.” What started as a lighthearted trend quickly took a darker turn.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Democrats ask ethics office to investigate Lutnick Tesla promotion
item.description: More than a dozen Democratic lawmakers asked the Office of Government Ethics on Thursday to open an investigation into Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick’s promotion of Tesla stock. Rep. Maxine Waters (D-Calif.), Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: ECMAScript 2025: Next Version of JavaScript Standardizes New Capabilities
item.description: ECMAScript 2025, the next version of an ECMA International standard for JavaScript, will standardize new JavaScript capabilities ranging from JSON modules to import attributes.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Musk says xAI buys social media platform X for $45 billion
item.description: Elon Musk said Friday his artificial intelligence firm xAI has bought his social media platform X. "xAI and X’s futures are intertwined. Today, we officially take the step to combine the data, models, compute, distribution and talent," Musk wrote in a post on X.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Salesforce’s Jamison Braun on adopting a maturity model for ‘natural’ digital transformation
item.description: This five-layer maturity model for digital transformation will break down silos and speed up decision-making at DoD, says Salesforce VP of global public sector.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Hypori’s Jared Shepard on implementing zero trust security on mobile devices
item.description: The Hypori CEO details cloud approach and tactics for using mobile devices for secure collaboration. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Hypori’s Jared Shepard on implementing zero trust security on mobile devices first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Researchers claim their protocol can create truly random numbers on a current quantum computer
item.description: A team that included researchers at a US bank says it has created a protocol that can generate certified truly random numbers, opening the possibility that current generation quantum computers can be used for secure applications in finance, cryptography, cybersecurity, and privacy.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department said this week it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Kyndryl extends Google Cloud partnership for AI-based mainframe modernization
item.description: Kyndryl and Google Cloud are expanding their partnership to help customers use generative AI to move data off the mainframe and into the cloud.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Critical RCE flaws put Kubernetes clusters at risk of takeover
item.description: The Kubernetes project has released patches for five vulnerabilities in a widely used popular component called the Ingress NGINX Controller that’s used to route external traffic to Kubernetes services. If exploited, the flaw could allow attackers to completely take over entire clusters.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: FBI warns about document conversion sites spreading malware
item.description: The FBI warns that some free online document converters load malware onto people's computers, making their private information vulnerable to attack.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Napster sold to tech commerce company for $207 million
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A brand that was notoriously connected to music piracy before reemerging as a subscription music service has been sold to Infinite Reality for $207 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
